parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const pid = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.property_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const name = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.display_name || pid).replace(/,/g, '').replace(/'/g, "''"); if (!pid) return 'SELECT 1'; return `INSERT INTO ga_properties (property_id, display_name, last_synced) VALUES ('${pid}', '${name}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (property_id) DO UPDATE SET display_name = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.display_name = '' THEN ga_properties.display_name ELSE EXCLUDED.display_name END, last_synced = NOW()`; })() }}
={{ (() => {   const pid = String($('Webhook').first().json.body.property_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''");   return `INSERT INTO refresh_log (property_id, status) VALUES ('${pid}', 'done')`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const su = String($('Webhook1').first().json.body.site_url || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const pl = String($('Webhook1').first().json.body.permission_level || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); if (!su) return 'SELECT 1'; return `INSERT INTO gsc_sites (site_url, permission_level, last_synced) VALUES ('${su}', '${pl}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (site_url) DO UPDATE SET permission_level = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.permission_level = '' THEN gsc_sites.permission_level ELSE EXCLUDED.permission_level END, last_synced = NOW()`; })() }}
={{ (() => { const su = String($('Webhook1').first().json.body.site_url || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `INSERT INTO refresh_log (property_id, status) VALUES ('${su}', 'done')`; })() }}
